metadata.name: ableton-remote-script
metadata.description: Create User Remote Scripts for Ableton Live to map MIDI controllers
metadata.author: Nick Foard

purpose: Generate a UserConfiguration.txt file for Ableton Live's InstantMappings feature, mapping a MIDI controller's CCs to Live's transport, mixer, and device controls
tone: Technical, precise, and practical. Focus on getting the CC mappings correct.

placeholders.name: CONTROLLER_NAME
placeholders.description: Name of your MIDI controller (will be the folder name)
placeholders.validation: Must start with a letter, no special characters except underscore

placeholders.name: INPUT_PORT
placeholders.description: Input port name as shown in Ableton MIDI preferences

placeholders.name: OUTPUT_PORT
placeholders.description: Output port name as shown in Ableton MIDI preferences

placeholders.name: TRANSPORT_LOOP_CC
placeholders.validation: Must be between 0 and 127 or -1 to disable

placeholders.name: FADER_START_CC
placeholders.description: Starting CC# for the 8 faders (channel strips 1-8)

placeholders.name: KNOB_START_CC
placeholders.description: Starting CC# for the 8 knobs/encoders (channel strips 1-8)

placeholders.name: MUTE_START_CC
placeholders.description: Starting CC# for the 8 Mute buttons (channel strips 1-8)
placeholders.example: If mute buttons are CC 48-55, enter 48

placeholders.name: SOLO_START_CC
placeholders.description: Starting CC# for the 8 Solo buttons (channel strips 1-8)
placeholders.example: If solo buttons are CC 32-39, enter 32

placeholders.name: RECORD_ARM_START_CC
placeholders.description: Starting CC# for the 8 Record Arm buttons (channel strips 1-8)
placeholders.example: If record buttons are CC 64-71, enter 64

placeholders.name: BANK_PREV_CC
placeholders.description: CC# for Previous Bank button (or Track Prev if no dedicated bank button)
placeholders.validation: Must be between 0 and 127 or -1 to disable

placeholders.name: BANK_NEXT_CC
placeholders.description: CC# for Next Bank button (or Track Next if no dedicated bank button)
placeholders.validation: Must be between 0 and 127 or -1 to disable

placeholders.name: OUTPUT_FOLDER
placeholders.description: Folder path where the script should be created

conditionals.condition: User has a mapping document (like nanoKontrol2mappings.md)
conditionals.action: Ask for the file path or offer to read from a standard location

conditionals.condition: User wants to map all controls

conditionals.action: Allow optional controls to be set to -1 (disabled)

steps.title: Transport Controls
steps.description: Map the transport buttons (Play, Stop, Rewind, Fast Forward, Record, Loop)

steps.title: Channel Strip Controls
steps.description: Map the 8 channel strips - faders, knobs, mute, solo, and record arm buttons. Enter the STARTING CC# for each group.

steps.title: Generate Script
steps.description: Create the UserConfiguration.txt file in the specified folder

validation.message: Controller name must start with a letter and contain only letters, numbers, or underscores
MIDI channel must be between 0 and 15

examples.title: nanoKONTROL2 Script Creation
examples.description: Example of creating a script for the Korg nanoKONTROL2
